name: Baga Beach
description: Lively beach area with water sports, cafes, and evening energy.

name: Calangute Beach
description: Wide popular beach suited for relaxed walks and classic Goa views.

name: Fort Aguada
description: Portuguese-era fort with sea views and easy sightseeing access.

name: Basilica of Bom Jesus
description: UNESCO-listed church and one of Old Goa's most important landmarks.

name: Fontainhas
description: Colorful Latin Quarter with heritage lanes, cafes, and galleries.

name: Dudhsagar Falls
description: Scenic waterfall day trip for nature and photography lovers.

name: Mapusa Market
description: Busy local market for spices, snacks, produce, and Goan goods.

name: Martin's Corner
description: Well-known Goan restaurant for seafood and regional dishes.

name: Gunpowder Goa
description: Popular restaurant known for coastal and regional Indian food.
